name: llmos
description: Vault-root resolution and automation for the shared llmOS Obsidian vault used across agent sessions

interface.shortDescription: Vault-root resolution and automation for the llmOS vault.
interface.longDescription: Resolves the shared llmOS Obsidian vault root, delivers vault conventions via a path-gated hook, and diagnoses/configures machine setup through the setup-llmos skill.
defaultPrompt: Use setup-llmos to verify this machine can access llmOS.
